query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as matching_count
FROM sales s
INNER JOIN parcels p ON s.parcelId = p.parcelNumber
WHERE s.parcelId IS NOT NULL;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Lyf6vpHy5kosAX.ad5e7732c0a3 --database KxciJFHZo62ThWBBp8dHpL --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as matching_count
